name: Cuatro Cuba Libre
title: Cuatro Cuba Libre Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Cuatro Cuba Libre | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A refreshing Cuba Libre variation made with BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum, cola, and fresh lime.
marketing_description: BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum and cola transforms this classic cuba libre cocktail into a complex, but still refreshing libation with a bright and zesty finish from the squeezed fresh lime. A perfect drink to enjoy with friends.

steps: Build: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Squeeze 2 lime wedges over the ice and drop them into the glass.
Pour in the BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum followed by chilled cola, and give it all a gentle stir.

raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Cuatro Cuba Libre Ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum 100 ml cola 2 lime wedges Servings Copy Cuatro Cuba Libre ingredients Copied! Cuatro Cuba Libre recipe One step at a time Step 1 Build To build this legendary cocktail, fill a highball glass with ice. Step 2 Squeeze Squeeze 2 lime wedges over the ice and drop them into the glass. Step 3 Pour Pour in the BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum followed by chilled cola, and give it all a gentle stir. Step 4 Garnish Garnish with lime.
